Typealiases.html#/s:11CohesionKit18Buffe.name: BufferedCollection
Typealiases.html#/s:11CohesionKit18Buffe.abstract: A collection providing an access to its buffer

Typealiases.html#/s:11CohesionKit5Stampa.name: Stamp
Typealiases.html#/s:11CohesionKit5Stampa.abstract: A type used to annotate track object modifications through time.

Structs/AliasKey.html.name: AliasKey
Structs/AliasKey.html.abstract: A value representing an Entity or set of Entity

Structs/EntityObserver.html.name: EntityObserver
Structs/EntityObserver.html.abstract: A type registering observers on a given entity from identity storage

Protocols/Logger.html#/s:11CohesionKit6L.name: didStore(_:id:)
Protocols/Logger.html#/s:11CohesionKit6L.abstract: Notify when an entity was stored in the identity map

Protocols/Logger.html#/s:11CohesionKit6L.name: didRegisterAlias(_:)
Protocols/Logger.html#/s:11CohesionKit6L.abstract: Notify an alias is registered with new entities

Protocols/Logger.html#/s:11CohesionKit6L.name: didUnregisterAlias(_:)
Protocols/Logger.html#/s:11CohesionKit6L.abstract: Notify an alias is suppressed from the identity map

Protocols/Observer.html#/s:11CohesionKit.name: value
Protocols/Observer.html#/s:11CohesionKit.abstract: The value at the time the observer creation.

Protocols/Observer.html#/s:11CohesionKit.name: observe(onChange:)
Protocols/Observer.html#/s:11CohesionKit.abstract: Add an observer being notified when entity change.

Protocols/Observer.html#/s:11CohesionKit.name: asPublisher
Protocols/Observer.html#/s:11CohesionKit.abstract: A Publisher emitting the observer current value and subscribing to any subsequents new values

Protocols/Observer.html.name: Observer
Protocols/Observer.html.abstract: A protocol allowing to observe a value returned from the IdentityMap

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: stamp
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Generate a stamp suitable to use in IdentityMap.

Enums/StampError.html#/s:11CohesionKit10.name: tooOld(current:received:)
Enums/StampError.html#/s:11CohesionKit10.abstract: received stamp is smaller than current stamp

Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.name: init(queue:logger:)
Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.abstract: Create a new IdentityMap instance optionally with a queue and a logger

Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.name: store(entity:named:modifiedAt:)
Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.abstract: Store an entity in the storage. Entity will be stored only if stamp (modifiedAt) is higher than in previous

Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.name: store(entity:named:modifiedAt:)
Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.abstract: Store an aggregate in the storage. Each aggregate entities will be stored only if stamp (modifiedAt) is higher than in previous

Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.name: find(_:id:)
Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.abstract: Try to find an entity/aggregate in the storage.

Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.name: find(named:)
Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.abstract: Try to find an entity/aggregate registered under named alias

Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.name: find(named:)
Classes/IdentityMap.html#/s:11CohesionKi.abstract: Try to find a collected registered under named alias
